plan_summary.plan_name: Crate Escape: Arla Milk Crate Recovery Campaign 2026
plan_summary.primary_goal: Recover 108,000 lost Arla milk crates (40% of 270,000 annual loss) in 2026 via dual-channel reverse logistics under a 4,000,000 DKK budget ceiling.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests volume gate, donation cap, logistics budget, foundation contribution floor, and the overall 4M DKK envelope against per-crate donation outlay and logistics burn.

key_values.label: Total program budget ceiling
key_values.comment: Hard expenditure cap covering donation, marketing, and logistics for the full 2026 campaign.
key_values.source_text: Total program budget ceiling of 4 million DKK - hard expenditure cap.

key_values.label: Maximum donation outlay cap
key_values.comment: Ceiling on per-crate donation incentive spend over the full campaign.
key_values.source_text: Maximum donation outlay of 1.35 million DKK - input to total cost model.

key_values.label: Logistics budget allocation
key_values.comment: Hard constraint on collection, transport, cleaning, and IT tracking spend.
key_values.source_text: Logistics budget allocation set at 1.65 million DKK - hard constraint on physical operational spend.

key_values.label: Charitable donation incentive per crate
key_values.comment: Per-crate charitable donation paid for each valid return; primary consumer lever.
key_values.source_text: Charitable donation incentive of 5 DKK per crate returned - incentive lever.

key_values.label: Minimum recovery volume target
key_values.comment: Floor for primary volume KPI; 40% of 270,000 annual loss.
key_values.source_text: Minimum success volume recovery target of 108,000 crates - primary KPI.

key_values.label: Minimum charitable contribution floor
key_values.comment: Secondary KPI floor: minimum donation to Arla Foundation over the campaign.
key_values.source_text: Minimum required donation to Arla Foundation of 500,000 DKK - secondary KPI floor.

key_values.label: Annual milk crate loss volume
key_values.comment: Denominator for the 40% recovery rate gate; total crates lost annually.
key_values.source_text: Estimated annual loss volume of 270,000 units - source population for recovery target.

derived_questions.question: Does realised recovered volume clear the 108,000-crate primary KPI floor?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Primary success metric for the campaign; below this, the environmental rationale fails.

derived_questions.question: Does total donation outlay clear the 500,000 DKK Arla Foundation floor?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Secondary CSR KPI; failing it undermines the charitable rationale of the campaign.

derived_questions.question: Does the recovery rate clear the stated 40% of annual loss volume?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Restates the volume gate as a rate against the true denominator; ties annual loss to feasibility.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Expected crates recovered in 2026
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Realised volume to test against the 108,000 target and to drive donation and logistics outlay.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor around 108,000; downside on incentive fatigue / municipal delay, upside on viral pickup; bound roughly 60k-160k.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Blended logistics cost per recovered crate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives logistics spend vs the 1.65M DKK budget; reviewer flagged 15 DKK/crate as a sensitivity threshold.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor near 15 DKK/crate; bound 8-25 DKK/crate using municipal vs supermarket spread from review section.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realized marketing spend
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tests pressure on the 1.0M DKK allocation under irreverent-tone risk and possible paid-media fallback.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor at 1,000,000 DKK; upside to ~1,500,000 DKK if irreverent narrative is vetoed and paid media is needed.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Total donation outlay
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Burn rate * volume; primary consumer-incentive cost driver feeding two viability gates.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Donation cap buffer
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive value confirms donation outlay stays within the 1.35M DKK ceiling.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Total logistics cost
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Bottom-up logistics burn needed to test against the 1.65M DKK budget.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Logistics budget surplus
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive value confirms logistics burn stays within the dedicated 1.65M DKK line item.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Total program budget surplus
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Single explicit 4M DKK envelope absorbs all three spend lines; positive = total ceiling held.

unmodelled_gates.label: Municipal liability transfer MoUs by Q1 end
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Q3 nationwide rollout depends on legally executed indemnity agreements with at least 50% of Tier 1 municipalities.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Municipal channel cannot launch in Q3; volume capped well below 108,000 and program viability collapses.

unmodelled_gates.label: Supermarket pre-approval of irreverent marketing tone
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Salling Group, Coop Danmark, and Rema 1000 must approve creatives or the primary collection channel withdraws partnership.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Forced pivot to testimonial/CO2 tone with up to 50% loss of organic impressions and additional paid-media cost.

unmodelled_gates.label: Food-grade sanitation certification of cleaning hubs
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Cleaned crates re-entering the dairy supply chain must meet Danish food-grade standards; non-compliance halts reintroduction.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Cleaned inventory cannot re-enter dairy cycle; 2027 production-reduction goal fails.
